name: askeri-terimler-sozlugu
description: Cloudflare Pages, Pages Functions ve D1 tabanlı Askerî Terimler Sözlüğü

scripts.build: node -e "console.log('Cloudflare Pages statik dosyaları ve Functions hazır.')"
scripts.check:syntax: node --check functions/_middleware.js && node --check functions/_lib/http.js && node --check functions/_lib/site.js && node --check functions/_lib/editor.js && node --check functions/_lib/term-letter.js && node --check scripts/check-seo.mjs
scripts.check: npm run check:syntax && npm run check:seo
